notes: The analog is specific to the verse's content (paramparā). Force-fit test: could this analog come equally well from 4.2 (lineage was lost), 4.3 (re-disclosure), or 4.15 (act as ancients did)? The analog's scenario (CTO opens architecture review by NAMING the lineage at the start) maps specifically to 4.1's opening function. Other chapter-4 verses elaborate; this one establishes.
